name: events
title: Event Timeline
description: Vertical event timeline widget: a scrollable column of up to 8 rows, each a coloured left rail with a dot marker, an event description and a right-mono timestamp. Rendered by the pure OOW.events renderer from a deterministic seed; row accents cycle through the severity tokens (teal/blue/orange/purple/green) via an inline --ev-c var. Rows carry a hover wash and, when made interactive for drill-down, a keyboard focus ring; an aria-disabled timeline dims for no-data/loading.
